name: urban_agriculture_water_allocation_model_kestrel_st_lt
premise: An internal crisis team convened after contradictory signals hit leadership from operations, legal, and external partners at once. In Urban Agriculture, the situation tagged internally around urban agriculture water allocation model kestrel st lt has converged with local pressure in the Marlow Junction corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The organization’s past incidents make short term feel morally loud today, while long term is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Ansel Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Ansel Kowalski, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Urban Agriculture. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Gideon Silva
agents.identity: I am Gideon Silva, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Urban Agriculture. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on long term.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on long term for immediate traction on short term.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Ansel Kowalski must choose under short term versus long term. What does Ansel Kowalski do?
